title: stigmatodactylus confusus
intro:
Stigmatodactylus confusus, commonly known as the confused pipevine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of S. confusus are attributed to its bioactive constituents, which include lignans and phenolic compounds that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the effects of S. confusus, but it is being studied for its potential in treating various health conditions.

side_effects: Stigmatodactylus confusus can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and vomiting, due to its high alkaloid content.
